title: Figure 5 in Determination of genetic variations between Apodemus mystacinus populations distributed in Turkey inferred from mtDNA PCR-RFLP
author: Karacan, Gül Olgun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5. PCoA analysis of A. mystacinus clades. The scatter plot is of the scores of three principal eigenvalues inferred from NTSYS software. Each scatter point represents a specimen of A. mystacinus.
steps_raw: Figure 5. PCoA analysis of A. mystacinus clades. The scatter plot is of the scores of three principal eigenvalues inferred from NTSYS software. Each scatter point represents a specimen of A. mystacinus.
